utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 items. Now check each for full specification per the brief: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (address, type, price, bedrooms, bathrooms) — fully specified. 
- financing: includes financing solution with terms — has down_payment, mortgage_amount, monthly_payment, term — sufficiently specified. 
- legal_services: legal services with costs — provider and total_cost present — specified. 
- moving_services: moving arrangements with costs — provider and total_cost present — specified. 
- setup_services: utility and setup services — includes utility_connection, home_inspection, insurance — specified. 
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown — includes purchase_price, closing_costs, total_transaction_cost — specified. All 6 items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes four selectable items that appear in the ground-truth sets: a purchase property (a townhouse at an address not listed in the ground truth), a financing type (mortgage), legal services (provider), moving services (provider), and setup services (utility connection, home inspection, insurance). We must only map items that exactly match names from the ground-truth ratings. The only overlapping categories with named options in the ground truth are financing type (purchase financing), legal services (essential_legal_services), moving services (moving_services), and property surveys/inspections. However, the final solution names do not match any of the ground-truth option names: financing is generically “mortgage” not one of the named options; legal provider is “Goldblatt Partners LLP” not one of the packages; moving provider is “Cargo Cabbie” not one of the named services; setup includes “home_inspection” but does not specify which survey option (e.g., Full Structural Survey). Therefore, there are no items in the final solution that can be mapped exactly to any ground-truth item names.
